title: Request for Proposals – Contract work
summary: The Alaska Ocean Observing System (AOOS) is working with World Wildlife Fund US Arctic Program and WWF Russia to integrate Russian data and information into the AOOS Ocean Data Explorer (ODE). title: Deadline Extended: NANA Collects Region Home Heating Data in Survey
summary: NANA has sent out a home heating survey by mail to every household in the NANA region regardless of shareholder status. The data collected will help NANA to better understand what communities are facing related to home heating issues as well as water and sewer systems. In-region residents can comple...

title: Indigenous Place Names in Anchorage
summary: The Indigenous Place Names Project plans to install 30 signs around Anchorage that showcase the location's original Dena'ina name. The post Indigenous Place Names in Anchorage appeared first on Alaska Magazine .
